desc: Edits properties on an existing Revision element — description, date, issued-by, issued-to, and the issued flag.
summary: Edits properties on an existing Revision element — description, date, issued-by, issued-to, and the issued flag. Only non-null parameters are applied, allowing partial updates. Uses CommandExecutor.GetParameter for AI-resolved inputs. Related: CreateRevisionCommand to create a new revision.
usecase: User wants to update a revision's description, date, or issue details.
notfor: Creating new revisions (use CreateRevisionCommand). Not for deleting revisions.
precondition: Active document must be open. Target revision must exist by element ID.
postcondition: The revision element has its specified fields updated.

outputs.name: Revision
outputs.description: Updated revision metadata including id, description, date, issuedBy, issuedTo, issued

thinkingsteps: Looking up revision by element ID...
